MOTION To Strike Ptlf'S Prayer For Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Jul-01-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT KAWASAKI MOTORS CORP., U.S.A.'S Motion To Strike Plaintiff's Prayer For Punitive Damages: GRANTED; no opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

For Hearing On Defendant Yamaha Corporation Of America'S Motion To Strike Plaintiff'S Prayer For Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Jun-22-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT YAMAHA CORPORATION OF AMERICA'S Motion To Strike Plaintiff's Prayer For Punitive Damages: OFF CALENDAR; insufficient service. Defendant originally served Brayton Purcell instead of Levin Simes & Kaiser, Plaintiff's counsel of record. Defendant did not serve Levin Simes with the notice of motion until June 7, 2004, only 15 days before the hearing. Therefore, the motion is not timely. (301/JLW/) Christina T. Paxton, CSR 1558
